summary: Full backend + frontend regression for VoltGo EV logistics MVP. All 27 backend tests PASS (auth/OTP, vehicles, fare, bookings, status flow, driver, admin, payments, RBAC). Frontend (Expo web) loads cleanly with VoltGo splash + 3 role cards; customer login → home → book screen, driver dashboard with online toggle/active job, admin dashboard + drivers/bookings/customers all render correctly with seeded data. Two minor cosmetic issues only: (1) OTP screen displays phone with country-code prefix duplicated (e.g. '+911111111111111' instead of '+911111111111'); (2) react-native-web deprecation warnings ('shadow*' style props and props.pointerEvents) — non-blocking but worth migrating to boxShadow / style.pointerEvents. No deprecated Expo packages found (no expo-av/barcode-scanner/background-fetch). SafeAreaView is correctly imported from react-native-safe-area-context.

ui_bugs.issue: Display reads 'Sent to +911111111111111.' — country code '+91' appears to be prepended to a phone string that already contains it, resulting in an extra '91' and an extra leading digit. The underlying API call is correct (login succeeds), only the displayed phone formatting is wrong.

issues: Console warnings: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' — migrate StyleSheet shadow* to boxShadow for web compatibility.
Console warnings: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' — move pointerEvents prop into style on touchable wrappers.

action_items: (Minor) Fix OTP screen phone display formatting in app/login.tsx — likely the phone state already contains '+91' but is being re-prefixed at render time.
(Minor) Replace deprecated 'shadow*' style props with 'boxShadow' and move 'pointerEvents' prop into style for react-native-web compatibility (non-blocking).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single 692-line file — still manageable but consider splitting routers (auth, bookings, driver, admin, payments) into modules if it grows.
Backend correctly excludes MongoDB _id via projection ({"_id": 0}) and clean() helper.
JWT_SECRET has a dev fallback — should be required in production via env (currently OK for MVP).
All API endpoints prefixed with /api ✓. Frontend uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL ✓.
Pydantic validates input on every endpoint ✓. HTTP status codes (400/401/403/404) are correct ✓.
RBAC enforced: require_role('admin') / require_role('driver') / require_role('customer') guards used appropriately and verified by tests.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (all primary flows render & navigate; only cosmetic phone-formatting + RN web deprecation warnings)

seed_data_creation: Added one auto-created customer '+919900100200' (TEST_AutoCreated) via auth/verify-otp during testing. Created bookings via customer JWT during status-flow and payments tests (all using existing seeded customer/vehicles).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_voltgo_backend.py covers 27 cases across all routers. Login flow: role-customer/driver/admin → send-otp-btn → input → 'Verify & continue' (text selector). Phone field has 'phone-input' testID. OTP field has 'otp-input' testID; verify button has 'verify-otp-btn' testID but on web the textInput consumes focus so use page.click('input') + keyboard.type('1234') then click button. Auth state persists across navigations in localStorage — use page.context.clear_cookies() + localStorage.clear() to force fresh login between roles.
rca_of_issue: OTP phone-display bug RCA: In app/login.tsx the country code is likely re-prefixed when navigating from phone-entry to OTP-verify even though phone state already contains '+91'. Reproduction: enter '1111111111' on customer role → tap Continue → OTP screen reads 'Sent to +911111111111111.' (extra '91' and extra digit). Mitigation: ensure the phone passed to the OTP route is stored once with leading '+91' and the display does not re-prepend '+91'.
